Karl Jansky invented the field of radio astronomy OTD in 1932. 

During a solar eclipse he saw no change in the faint radio hiss he'd been monitoring, ruling out the sun as a source. He soon attributed this "star noise" to large ionized gas clouds near the center of the Milky Way. 🧪 🔭

Monday project. Reverse seared T-Bone recipe. Start with 1.5 to 2” cut. Dry brine in fridge with favorite rub 2-4 days. Pull and 1hr later place in 250 deg oven. Pull when inside temp is 100f. Sear on hot grill or pan to int. temp of 125-130f. Rest for 20 mins. Cut and serve with sides. Enjoy!
